description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest environment with predefined Qt, SDK, NDK, and build tools versions. It runs a build job in parallel across multiple architectures, including armeabi-v7a, arm64-v8a, x86, and x86_64, with a strategy to upload artifacts for multi-architecture builds. The job installs dependencies, performs release or daily builds and deployments based on the GitHub reference, and uploads release or daily build artifacts to GitHub Releases.
